title: AVIR

headings.text: The Arena Collection by Sonus Faber
The Arena Collection: Precision, Power, and Italian Pride

If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingThe Arena Collection by Sonus FaberPosted on July 16, 2025The Arena Collection: Precision, Power, and Italian PrideArena is a system designed to bring cinematic sound into the home with scale and control. It delivers powerful dynamics with clarity, allowing you to hear every detail without overwhelming your space.‍‍The foundation of Arena lies in its subwoofer design. Sonus faber has created a structure that manages bass with control and depth. Dialogue stays intelligible. Low frequencies remain present without distortion. Action has weight without muddying the rest of the soundtrack.Each speaker is built by hand in Vicenza. The construction is solid and intentional. Materials are chosen for their acoustic performance and longevity. No plastic. No unnecessary flourishes. Just honest craftsmanship with a purpose.‍‍Installation is clean and simple. The new bracket system allows Arena speakers to mount flush with the wall. If you prefer a concealed look, there are grille options that preserve both sound and appearance. Frames are adjustable to accommodate different finishes and placements.The speakers are designed to complement your space rather than compete with it. Yet the presence of Arena is unmistakable. These are not background speakers. They bring presence and scale without harshness.With 400 to 600 watts of power output, Arena is capable of high-volume performance without stress. Whether you are watching a film or listening to music, the sound remains natural and consistent.Arena does not force a tradeoff between aesthetics and performance. It is a system that respects both.‍‍‍‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‍‍‍‍‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
